Six policy types: content filters (HATE/VIOLENCE/SEXUAL/INSULTS/MISCONDUCT with configurable strength NONE/LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH per input/output), denied topics (LLM-based classifier), word filters (exact/fuzzy), PII anonymization (ANONYMIZE or BLOCK per entity type: EMAIL/PHONE/US_SSN etc.), grounding (hallucination detection against reference context), automated reasoning (policy-logic enforcement). Two key APIs: apply_guardrail on bedrock-runtime (standalone moderation, no LLM needed, source=INPUT or OUTPUT, content=[{text:{text:...}}]) and Converse API with guardrailConfig param. Response action field: GUARDRAIL_INTERVENED or NONE; assessments array gives per-policy explainability. June 2025: Standard tier adds better contextual understanding and 60+ language support vs Classic tier. Dec 2024: pricing reduced 85% to $0.15/1K text units for content filters and denied topics. Create guardrail via bedrock (control plane) client; apply via bedrock-runtime client. At review time search for: new policy types, Standard tier adoption, multimodal guardrails updates, pricing changes, new language support.
